scripts.build: tsc && cp src/prompts/*.md dist/src/prompts/ && mkdir -p dist/packages/discord/prompts dist/packages/cli/prompts && cp packages/discord/prompts/*.md dist/packages/discord/prompts/ && cp packages/cli/prompts/*.md dist/packages/cli/prompts/
scripts.server: cd server && uv run uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
scripts.server:dev: cd server && uv run uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --reload
